items.title: The end of an era for the Celtics.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
The end of an era for the Celtics.

Jayson Tatum & Jaylen Brown:
332-167 in the regular season (.665 win pct.)
73-48 in the playoffs (.603 win pct.)
16 playoff series wins
1 NBA championship

items.title: Jaylen Brown was as present in the community as any star you'll find. His efforts through the 7uice Foundation, the Bridge Program, and Boston XChange highlighted the bond he built with the city.

items.title: Jaylen Brown:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Jaylen Brown:
13,474 points (10th in franchise history)
83 playoff wins, the most in his time in the league
6 ECF appearances
1 ECF MVP
1 NBA title
1 NBA Finals MVP
